hero.title.line2: Your whole construction business in one place.
hero.subtitle: BuildTrack centralizes projects, time tracking, finance, warehouse and subcontractors — so you spend your day building, not chasing spreadsheets.
hero.note: 14-day free trial · Set up in minutes
videos.title: BuildTrack in action
videos.subtitle: See how the platform works. We'll keep adding walkthroughs of every module.
videos.placeholder.label: Coming soon
videos.placeholder.title: New walkthrough on the way
features.title: Everything your job site needs
features.subtitle: One system for the critical day-to-day flows. No complicated integrations, no duplicate data entry.
features.projects.title: Projects & contracts
features.projects.body: Track every job, its client, budget, change orders and progress — from signing to close-out.
features.time.title: Time & attendance
features.time.body: Geofenced clock-ins, supervisor approval, and payroll-ready hour reports.
features.finance.title: Integrated finance
features.finance.body: Accounts payable and receivable, labor cost, and office expenses — with cash flow and reconciliation.
features.mobile.title: Mobile app for crews
features.mobile.body: Clock in, upload evidence, and communicate from the field, even with spotty connectivity. Available now on Android — iPhone coming soon.
features.subcontractors.title: Subcontractors & warehouse
features.subcontractors.body: Job traceability, photo evidence, tools and consumables under control.
features.audit.title: Audit & roles
features.audit.body: Every action is logged. Role-based access — admin, supervisor, finance, warehouse, subcontractor.
app.title: The job site in your pocket
app.body: Geofenced clock-ins, photo evidence and site progress from every worker's phone — even without signal. Available today on Android; the iPhone version is on the way.
why.title: Built by people who've actually worked in the field.
why.body: Not another generic ERP retrofitted for construction. BuildTrack was born inside a real builder and refined project after project — every flow reflects decisions you've already lived on site.
why.point.0: Fast implementation — productive in one week
why.point.1: Multi-company: each customer in its own isolated space
why.point.2: Bilingual support, in your time zone
mock.label: Active project
mock.subtitle: Phase 3 · 47 workers
cta.subtitle: Join the builders who've already left spreadsheet chaos behind.
